description: This pipeline reads in an image, applies filtering and outputs the result. The main steps include reading in the image and applying a filter.

68997ba1-f4a5-445c-b7c2-8e01a22cdafa.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
68997ba1-f4a5-445c-b7c2-8e01a22cdafa.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

9410cdab-1ebb-4a0d-83c3-3c52c9fc090e.name: ij1-roi-filter-statistics
9410cdab-1ebb-4a0d-83c3-3c52c9fc090e.description:
Filters the ROI list elements via statistics.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

6d2189ec-59b7-4e31-af74-fee77a4e2124.name: ij1-roi-outline
6d2189ec-59b7-4e31-af74-fee77a4e2124.description:
Applies one of the following operations to all ROI in the list:
  • Convert to closed polygon
  • Convert to polygon
  • Calculate convex hull
  • Convert to bounding rectangle
  • Convert to minimum bounding rectangle (rotated rectangle)
  • Convert to oriented line
  • Convert to fitted circle
  • Convert to fitted ellipse
  • Apply split fitting to polygons

9f3c6cf6-2a6e-4f31-9673-9b8831aac4b7.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
9f3c6cf6-2a6e-4f31-9673-9b8831aac4b7.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

961d3685-5557-4dc8-84f6-2c093cbfd0e9.name: ij1-color-blend-images
961d3685-5557-4dc8-84f6-2c093cbfd0e9.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

5213d82a-b375-4af0-911e-763930121d4e.name: ij1-roi-to-annotations
5213d82a-b375-4af0-911e-763930121d4e.description: Extracts properties of the ROI lists and stores them into annotations. This will create a list of annotation values if there are multiple ROI per list, unless you choose the option to only return the first entry. By default, one value per ROI is generated. Enable de-duplication to disable this behavior.

a3f69a70-df7a-4eda-9d33-43ee96e3dad1.name: ij1-analyze-find-particles2d
a3f69a70-df7a-4eda-9d33-43ee96e3dad1.description: Converts mask images into ROI by applying a connected components algorithm and generates measurements. Please note that this algorithm will always trace the external object boundaries and convert them into polygonal ROIs. This means that holes will be closed. This node requires a thresholded image as input and will extract measurements from the thresholded image. If you already have ROI available and want measurements, use 'Extract ROI statistics'.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the results are generated for each 2D slice.

513220be-0f29-4363-82dd-603b19e1092c.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
513220be-0f29-4363-82dd-603b19e1092c.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

bd229ac9-c112-4b66-b8c5-2da23c0ebd90.name: ij1-analyze-find-particles2d
bd229ac9-c112-4b66-b8c5-2da23c0ebd90.description: Converts mask images into ROI by applying a connected components algorithm and generates measurements. Please note that this algorithm will always trace the external object boundaries and convert them into polygonal ROIs. This means that holes will be closed. This node requires a thresholded image as input and will extract measurements from the thresholded image. If you already have ROI available and want measurements, use 'Extract ROI statistics'.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the results are generated for each 2D slice.

4959e8a3-8852-46d4-91c8-8abbeaab7dd9.name: cellpose-segmentation-inference-3.x
4959e8a3-8852-46d4-91c8-8abbeaab7dd9.description:
Runs Cellpose on the input image with the given model(s). This node supports both segmentation in 3D and executing Cellpose for each 2D image plane. This node can generate a multitude of outputs, although only ROI is activated by default. Go to the 'Outputs' parameter section to enable the other outputs.
  • Labels: A grayscale image where each connected component is assigned a unique value.
  • Flows XY: An RGB image that indicates the x and y flow of each pixel
  • Flows Z: Flows in Z direction (black for non-3D images)
  • Flows d: Multi-channel image that contains the flows [dZ, dY, dX, cell probability] (3D images) / [dY, dX, cell probability] (2D images)
  • Probabilities: An image indicating the cell probabilities for each pixel
  • ROI: ROI of the segmented areas.
Please note that you need to setup a valid Python environment with Cellpose installed. You can find the setting in Project > Application settings > Extensions > Cellpose.

This algorithm merges all annotations and data annotations. Use the iteration step settings to determine how annotations and data annotations are merged

16856f19-8ea7-4dd7-9f55-0ab1c14a6509.name: ij1-background-rollingball2d
16856f19-8ea7-4dd7-9f55-0ab1c14a6509.description: Finds or subtracts the background of a 2D slice via a rolling-ball or paraboloid algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

f16dcc7e-75da-4671-a665-f7870fe9fcac.name: cellpose-segmentation-inference-3.x
f16dcc7e-75da-4671-a665-f7870fe9fcac.description:

  • Probabilities: An image indicating the cell probabilities for each pixel
  • ROI: ROI of the segmented areas.

This algorithm merges all annotations and data annotations. Use the iteration step settings to determine how annotations and data annotations are merged

a81be32b-d707-4915-9569-869433a1c214.name: ij1-roi-explode
a81be32b-d707-4915-9569-869433a1c214.description: Splits the ROI in a ROI list into individual ROI lists.

be649d7b-0b1e-42dc-8f3e-a1fe1847f4ad.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
be649d7b-0b1e-42dc-8f3e-a1fe1847f4ad.description:

c1f918c3-b65a-4c08-ae32-7b57076c5e1a.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

e420819b-048d-404e-a7e8-c722bd9e9149.name: annotate-set-single
e420819b-048d-404e-a7e8-c722bd9e9149.description: Sets a single annotation. The name and the value are determined by expressions

2da81734-be0d-4240-b425-b5a3b82334c7.name: cellpose-segmentation-inference-3.x
2da81734-be0d-4240-b425-b5a3b82334c7.description:

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

01b217be-8895-4c0e-8562-699a7e7f1246.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
01b217be-8895-4c0e-8562-699a7e7f1246.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

f5a80756-63aa-4131-9993-57bc05b664e4.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
f5a80756-63aa-4131-9993-57bc05b664e4.description:

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

599ca6c9-dee3-492f-ace8-6e5f01439316.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
599ca6c9-dee3-492f-ace8-6e5f01439316.description:

29eef9ed-6524-4a4f-a083-56e6158844c1.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
29eef9ed-6524-4a4f-a083-56e6158844c1.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

26ecfd34-6b8a-4dd0-98cb-5e9c79edf0c8.name: ij1-roi-filter-statistics
26ecfd34-6b8a-4dd0-98cb-5e9c79edf0c8.description:
Filters the ROI list elements via statistics.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

163c6986-a27f-4e62-a7e9-c3284f48c17a.name: ij1-roi-merge
163c6986-a27f-4e62-a7e9-c3284f48c17a.description:
Merges multiple ROI lists by using data annotations. By default, ROIs with equivalent annotations are put into the same group and merged into one ROI list for each group. Use the parameters to control how groups are created. To merge all incoming ROI lists into just one list, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave the list of annotation columns empty.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

b363a0cf-90b5-425c-b4e1-d997e3cef6cc.name: ij1-binary-dtwatershed2d
b363a0cf-90b5-425c-b4e1-d997e3cef6cc.description: Applies an euclidean distance transform on binary images. Then applies a watershed algorithm.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

218f7700-6085-42e2-b790-70a1d0d1a376.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
218f7700-6085-42e2-b790-70a1d0d1a376.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

b70c26d0-01e8-499c-acc5-7be241dffed5.name: ij1-morph-binary-fillholes2d
b70c26d0-01e8-499c-acc5-7be241dffed5.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

fea26e23-75a8-4d81-be77-1fd61e1e11ad.description:
